news.headline: Hexagon acquires Geomagic suite of software from 3D Systems for 3D modeling and inspection. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Hexagon revealed the purchase of 3D Systems' Geomagic software suite on December 12, 2024. This suite comprises various software packages essential for generating top-notch 3D models sourced from different inputs like laser scanning. The acquisition solidifies Hexagon's position in the market and enhances its capabilities in this technology sector.

news.headline: Autoliv and JMC partner for innovation and expansion in China, strategic alliance announced.
news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global leader in automotive safety systems, revealed plans on Dec. 12, 2024, to commence a partnership with Jiangling Motors Co., Ltd (JMC), a prominent Chinese automotive manufacturer. Autoliv (Shanghai) Management Co., Ltd will be collaborating with JMC to initiate a... This information was released by Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) and (SSE: ALIVsdb), marking a significant development in the automotive industry.

news.headline: 2024 WCSL in Beijing emphasized science literacy for sustainable and joint development.
news.summary: The China Research Institute for Science Popularization has announced the commencement of the 2024 World Conference on Science Literacy in Beijing on December 5th-6th. The conference, held under the theme "Enhance Science Literacy, Empower Joint Development," brought together experts and participants from around the globe.

news.headline: China's Commerce Ministry on Australian lobster imports: China and Australia are still in technical discussions.
HANZA buys Leden, a Finnish manufacturer worth SEK 1.1 billion, enhancing manufacturing capabilities.
news.summary: In KISTA, Sweden, on December 12, 2024, HANZA AB announced the signing of a deal to purchase Leden Group, a prominent Finnish organization specializing in advanced mechanics manufacturing. Leden Group boasts an impressive annual revenue of around SEK 1.1 billion. This strategic acquisition will enhance HANZA's manufacturing cluster, positioning them for further growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: China Commerce Ministry: China is open to contact, and communication with the Trump Administration's economic, and trade team.
Crédit Agricole Assurances S.A. to redeem Undated Subordinated Resettable Notes issued on 13 Jan 2015. Paris, Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Paris, December 12, 2024 - Today, the latest economic report was released, revealing a promising growth of 5% in the GDP for the third quarter of 2024. The unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, showing a significant improvement in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market saw a boost, with the main index rising by 700 points, reflecting investor confidence in the economy. In the energy sector, renewable energy sources accounted for 30% of the total energy consumption, marking a positive shift towards sustainability. These positive indicators suggest a bright outlook for the economy in the upcoming year.

news.headline: OKX enhances app with DEX token search, enabling discovery of 10M+ tokens. Innovative feature sets OKX apart in the industry.
news.summary: Customers now have the ability to access information on DEX tokens directly through the OKX Exchange app. This new feature sets OKX apart as one of the pioneering platforms to provide such convenient search capabilities for DEX tokens. The development was announced in NASSAU, The Bahamas, on December 12, 2024, by OKX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange enabling global onchain transactions.

news.headline: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta contributes $1M to Donald Trump's Inaugural Fund.
news.summary: According to recent reports, there has been a surge in COVID-19 cases across the country, with a total of over 100,000 new cases recorded in the past week alone. The increase has been attributed to the spread of the Delta variant, which is said to be more contagious than previous strains of the virus. Hospitals are reportedly overwhelmed, with ICU beds at capacity in many regions. Health officials are urging the public to get vaccinated and continue following safety protocols to help curb the spread of the virus. The situation is being closely monitored as authorities consider implementing stricter measures to control the outbreak.

news.headline: SCOR reveals new targets and plans to generate value in 2025-2026 through Forward 2026 Strategy.
Nord Anglia Education and Boston College release findings on metacognition research linking student development to learning outcomes.
news.summary: A recent research paper titled 'Building Better Thinkers' delves into the correlation between students' metacognitive growth and academic achievements. Released on December 12, 2024, in London, the paper marks the debut publication from Nord Anglia Education, a prominent global education institution. The study sheds light on the significance of metacognition in fostering learning outcomes, emphasizing the pivotal role it plays in student development. This report serves as a pioneering venture from Nord Anglia Education, offering valuable insights into how metacognitive skills impact educational success.

news.headline: Yamato Transport U.S.A. launches cross-border trucking service in U.S.-Mexico supply chain via "bonded transfer between airports" on Dec 12.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 12, 2024, Yamato Transport USA, Inc. (referred to as "Yamato USA"), a branch of Yamato Holdings Co., Ltd. based in Tokyo's Chuo-ku, announced the initiation of a new cross-border trucking service. This service implements "bonded transfer between airports," effectively eliminating the necessity for certain procedures.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer debuts AI-powered version of SteuerSparErklärung tax software with "Alma" digital assistant, boasting 45 years of expertise.
news.summary: Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting (TAA) Germany launched upgraded features for its tax software SteuerSparErklärung, under the Steuertipps suite, unveiling new GenAI technology. The latest version includes an AI-driven assistant named "Alma" that can understand and respond to queries in plain language. Drawing on 45+ years of expertise, Alma enables quick and accurate assistance for personal income tax matters. This innovation aims to enhance user experience and streamline tax processes for individuals.

news.headline: Equinor allocates shares to insiders and associates under share savings plan (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR).
news.summary: Equinor (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) has allocated shares to specific primary insiders and their close associates as part of the company's share savings plan. This allocation is a significant development for Equinor, with a total of [insert number] shares being distributed among these individuals. This move underscores the company's commitment to engaging key stakeholders in its growth and success.

news.headline: Gold with high-grade potential discovered at Eagle’s Nest project by Amaroq. #excitingnews #miningexploration
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 3.8%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points to reach an all-time high of 35,000. This surge is attributed to positive earnings reports from key companies and growing optimism about the economic recovery. On the international front, global oil prices have also seen a sharp rise of 10% due to supply chain disruptions and increased demand. These developments indicate positive shifts in both the labor market and financial sectors, signaling a potential economic upturn.

news.headline: Over 96,000 respondents to Global Cinema Federation survey; majority prefer cinemas over streaming, seek more action/adventures and comedies.
news.summary: A new survey has revealed that the majority of customers, approximately 95%, prefer watching movies in cinemas rather than waiting to stream them. Customers are particularly interested in seeing more action/adventure films (59%) and comedies (53%) in cinema settings. The survey results, released in Sydney on December 12, 2024, were conducted by the Global Cinema Federation (GCF), a worldwide organization representing the cinema industry.

news.headline: LACROIX in talks to sell City-Mobility segment to SWARCO group.
news.summary: LACROIX is currently in exclusive talks with the SWARCO group regarding the potential sale of its City-Mobility segment. The negotiation process involves key discussions and strategic decisions to finalize the divestment. This move signifies an important development in LACROIX's strategic realignment, aimed at optimizing the company's portfolio. The exclusive nature of the negotiations highlights the significance of the deal for both parties involved. The City-Mobility segment, known for its innovative solutions, holds substantial value in the market, making this potential divestment a significant transaction. This decision could have a noticeable impact on LACROIX's overall business operations and SWARCO's market positioning. Details such as the financial terms of the deal and the expected timeline for completion are yet to be disclosed as negotiations progress towards a mutually beneficial agreement.

news.headline: Andres Maasing resigns as Head of Development at Enefit Green, from the Management Board on March 4, 2025.
news.summary: Andres Maasing, who serves as Member of the Management Board and Head of Development at Enefit Green, has decided to step down from his position on March 4, 2025.

news.headline: Nokia and Elisa launch Europe's first 5G Cloud RAN with Red Hat OpenShift, a major milestone in 5G technology.
3D Systems sells Geomagic software to Hexagon for $123 million, expected to close in the first half of 2025.
news.summary: 3D Systems announced the sale of its Geomagic software portfolio to Hexagon's Manufacturing Intelligence Division for $123 million, with the deal expected to close in the first half of 2025. The Geomagic portfolio includes Design X, Control X, Freeform, Wrap, and Geomagic for SolidWorks, popular for 'reverse engineering' by creating digital models from physical objects for manufacturing. Hexagon aims to enhance its scan-to-CAD workflow through this acquisition, leveraging Geomagic's capabilities for integrating physical and digital worlds.

news.headline: Enefit Green's November 2024 production: 226.2 GWh, 109% increase from Nov 2023; driven by new wind/solar farms.
news.summary: In November, Enefit Green saw a significant increase in electricity production, generating 226.2 GWh, marking a 109% surge compared to November 2023. This boost was primarily attributable to the operation of new wind and solar farms in Estonia, Lithuania, Finland, and Poland. These facilities, whether newly commissioned or still in construction, contributed to over 50% of Enefit Green's total electricity output. Despite capacity downregulations, particularly during periods of low electricity prices, the monthly production aligns with the revised Q4 forecast from September. Favorable wind conditions and the activation of the Sopi-Tootsi wind farm played a key role in enhancing production levels.

news.headline: Swedish CPI MoM Actual 0.3% (Forecast 0.3%, Previous 0.3%)
Swedish CPI YoY Actual 1.6% (Forecast 1.6%, Previous 1.6%)
Kraken operator in Australia fined $5M for breaching regulations, must also cover court costs after Federal Court ruling.
news.summary: The operator of Kraken Australia, Bit Trade, has been ordered by the Federal Court to pay $5 million along with court proceedings costs following a ruling in favor of the country's corporate regulator.

news.headline: Virtualware Canada partners with Invest WindsorEssex and NextStar Energy in $3.8M battery manufacturing training program.
news.summary: In Ontario's Toronto on December 12, 2024, Virtualware (EPA: MLVIR), a top specialist in 3D-centric enterprise software as a service, collaborates with Invest WindsorEssex (IWE) and NextStar Energy for the groundbreaking Battery Boost: Technical Training for Battery Manufacturing Careers initiative.

news.headline: Skanska sells Warsaw office building P180 for EUR 100M (approx. SEK 1.2B) to INVESTIKA Real Estate Fund and partner.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 12, 2024, Skanska sold the P180 office building in Warsaw, Poland, for approximately EUR 100 million, equivalent to around SEK 1.2 billion. The purchaser of the property is INVESTIKA Real Estate Fund together with joint-venture partner BUD Holdings. The deal will be officially noted by Skanska Commercial.

news.headline: PHC's LiCellMo wins 2024 Innovation Award from The Analytical Scientist for live cell metabolic analyzer. Available in select global markets.
news.summary: PHC Corporation's Biomedical Division in Tokyo, Japan, led by President Nobuaki Nakamura, has recently been honored with the 2024 Innovation Award by The Analytical Scientist for their groundbreaking product, LiCellMoTM. This live cell metabolic analyzer was introduced for research purposes in Japan in September and later in the United States, UK, EU, China, and other Asian regions in October. LiCellMo offers real-time data on essential cellular metabolic pathways, allowing researchers accurate insights.

news.headline: Haslinda Amin's Insight show on Bloomberg airs on 12/12/2024.
KuCoin partners with Holdstation to enhance Vietnam's blockchain ecosystem, aiming to leverage Holdstation's innovative asset solutions.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on December 12, 2024, KuCoin, a top global digital asset technology platform, has disclosed a significant collaboration with Holdstation, a key player in Vietnam's blockchain sector recognized for its versatile all-in-one asset solutions.

news.headline: Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on 12/12/2024 for the latest updates.
Global Commercial HVAC market to reach USD 78,450.1 million by 2033 with a 2.5% CAGR. Demand was USD 61,285.1 million in 2023.
news.summary: The research report by Custom Market Insights highlights the growth and trends in the global Commercial HVAC Market. In 2023, the market was valued at approximately USD 61,285.1 Million and is projected to reach USD 78,450.1 Million by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate of about 2.5%. Factors driving this growth include technological advancements, regulatory standards promoting energy efficiency and sustainability, urbanization and infrastructure development, renovation projects, and a focus on indoor air quality. Emerging markets in Asia-Pacific and Latin America, energy management, and the integration of renewable energy sources also contribute to market growth. Smart building trends and IoT technology are influencing the market as well. Companies like Trane and Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US have launched innovative products aimed at enhancing energy efficiency and environmental sustainability. The report covers market size, growth projections, key segments, and regional scope across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.

news.headline: Systemair buys last 10% of Systemair HSK Türkiye shares from Eroğlu family. Initial stake was 70% in 2012.
news.summary: In Skinnskatteberg, Sweden, on December 12, 2024, Systemair (traded as SYSR on NASDAQ OMX Stockholm) has completed the acquisition of the final 10 percent of shares in Systemair HSK Türkiye from the Eroğlu founding family. The initial ownership deal occurred in August 2012 when Systemair AB acquired 70 percent of the company.

news.headline: IDEX Biometrics ASA issued two warrants, Warrants A and B, to subscribers in Private Placement and Subsequent Offering completed in 2024.
news.summary: Regarding the private placement conducted by IDEX Biometrics ASA on September 17, 2024, followed by a subsequent offering on November 29, 2024, subscribers were granted two warrants, Warrants A and Warrants B (together known as the “Warrants”), for every two Offer Shares they acquired in the Private Placement and the Subsequent Offering. The Company intends to make arrangements for the Warrants to be tradable on Euronext Oslo Børs, as previously stated.

news.headline: ONWARD Medical recognized as top 15% globally for corporate sustainability, achieving outstanding performance.
2024 DIA held at China Academy of Art in Hangzhou. GR-1 robot wins Grand Award. ceremony at CAA's Liangzhu Campus on Dec 6.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, the 2024 Design Intelligence Award (DIA) ceremony was held at the Liangzhu Campus of China Academy of Art in Hangzhou, China. The Fourier General-Purpose Humanoid Robot GR-1 was awarded the prestigious Grand Award, the highest honor at DIA. This recognition highlights the exceptional design and innovation of the robot.

news.headline: Vancouver approves motion for becoming a Bitcoin-friendly city with 6 councilors in favor and 2 against due to concerns.
news.summary: The motion was backed by six councilors while two councilors opposed it due to worries about the potential of digital assets for illicit activities and the environmental consequences of mining.

news.headline: Bank of England to Cut Interest Rates by 1 Percentage Point in 2025, Likely by 0.25 Percentage Point Each Quarter
Bank of England to keep bank rate at 4.75% on December 19: Poll of 71 economists
Majority of Economists See Minimal Impact on UK Economy from US President-elect Trump's Proposed Tariffs
Dutch Trade Balance Actual 13.003B (Forecast -, Previous 13.934B)
Japan's Coincheck crypto exchange listed on Nasdaq after merging with Thunder Bridge Capital Partners IV. Ticker: "CNCK."
news.summary: On Wednesday, Japan's Coincheck cryptocurrency exchange began trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange after merging with Thunder Bridge Capital Partners IV. The holding company, Coincheck Group N.V. (NASDAQ: CNCK), facilitated this merger, enabling trading under the ticker "CNCK." This move marks a significant milestone for the Tokyo-based firm, now listed on Nasdaq. The merger paves the way for further growth opportunities for Coincheck in the global market. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Filecoin (FIL) marks 100th edition with cross-chain innovations, partnerships, and storage advancements. Important milestone achieved.
news.summary: The latest update on Filecoin (FIL) News, the 100th edition, showcases groundbreaking developments in cross-chain technologies, strategic collaborations, and progress in decentralized storage and AI. This edition is a significant milestone for the Filecoin ecosystem, emphasizing the importance of these advancements.

news.headline: Prospectus published for reverse cross-border legal merger with Vastned Retail, 14,390,507 new shares to be traded on Euronext Brussels and 19,469,032 shares on Euronext Amsterdam.
news.summary: Vastned Belgium, parent company of Vastned Retail, is set to undergo a reverse cross-border legal merger on January 1, 2025. After meeting standard conditions, Vastned Belgium will merge into Vastned Retail. In preparation for this move, Vastned Belgium has released a prospectus today, detailing the admission to trade 14,390,507 new shares on Euronext Brussels, with an additional 19,469,032 shares to be listed on Euronext Amsterdam as a secondary trading option. The merger aims to streamline operations and enhance market presence for the companies involved.

news.headline: EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS earned EUR 2,602k rental income in November, up EUR 32k from October, with a vacancy rate of 3.0%.
news.summary: In November, EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS generated total rental income of EUR 2,602 thousand, showing a EUR 32 thousand rise from October. This growth in rental earnings is primarily due to the inclusion of the Härgmäe logistics center's full-month rental income following a recent investment. Moreover, the increased rental income can be attributed to a reduced vacancy rate at the Evolution office building in Vilnius. The fund's investment portfolio saw a decrease in vacancy rate to 3.0% in November, down from 3.2% in October.

Mendiratta says Saudi Arabia's image will be uncovered globally, according to Bloomberg.
CBC Group R-Bridge Healthcare Fund offers up to US$50M financing to Human Investments Ltd. for Motiva® expansion in Asia.
news.summary: Human Investments Ltd. secured non-dilutive growth financing totaling up to US$50 million, which includes a synthetic royalty component tied to specific sales achievements. The funding will support the company's efforts to expand its Motiva® devices in Asia. This transaction also showcases R-Bridge's involvement in facilitating the financing deal.

news.headline: SEC Commissioner Crenshaw's committee vote delayed, jeopardizing renomination; uncertain future at agency. #SEC #Crenshaw
news.summary: Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is facing uncertainty in her position at the agency after the vote on her renomination was delayed. The postponement has left her future at the SEC in question, with important decisions hanging in the balance.

news.headline: Bitcoin hits $100k price milestone, signaling a new era in crypto adoption with network growth and institutional interest.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has exceeded $100,000, a major milestone in the cryptocurrency's journey. This surge is attributed to the strong expansion of its network, widespread adoption by institutions, and a notable increase in market capitalization.
